# WedMePandit

> Authentic Vedic Wedding & Hindu Ritual Services in Delhi NCR

WedMePandit provides experienced Pandit Ji services for Hindu weddings, Griha Pravesh, Havan, Satyanarayan Katha, Namkaran Sanskar, and other Vedic rituals across Delhi NCR.

## Website
https://www.wedmepandit.com

## Main Pages
- Home: https://www.wedmepandit.com/
- About: https://www.wedmepandit.com/about-us
- Services: https://www.wedmepandit.com/Our-services
- Gallery: https://www.wedmepandit.com/gallery
- Blogs: https://www.wedmepandit.com/blogs
- Contact: https://www.wedmepandit.com/contact

## Services Offered
- Hindu Wedding Ceremony
- Vedic Vivah Sanskar
- Griha Pravesh Puja
- Havan & Yagya
- Satyanarayan Katha
- Namkaran Sanskar
- Mundan Ceremony
- Festival Puja
- Online Pandit Booking
- Arya Samaj Marriage

## Blog Articles
- Yaga and Environmental Protection
- The Sacred Bond of Marriage
- Hindu Wedding Ceremony Guide
